result:
R3 COMPLETE — restriction / lemma FORMULA rendering implemented, byte-parity green over a 20-file curated corpus set.

WHAT LANDED (all inside /home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/):
- workspace/pretty-clean/src/formula.rs (new, 134 lines): trace-formula renderer. Glyphs ∀ ∃ ⇒ ∧ ∨ ¬ ⇔ ⊤ ⊥; atoms `Fact( .. ) @ tp` (hsep — @ never drops alone), `t1 < t2`, `t1 = t2`, `t1 ⊏ t2` (all `sep [lhs <+> glyph, rhs]`), `last(tp)` (no interior spaces). Paren law: EVERY binary-connective operand and every ¬-argument parenthesized; quantifier bodies and top level bare; source association preserved. Quantifier = `sep [glyph<>" "<>fsep binders<>".", nest 1 body]`. Plus the pinned safety classifier: safety iff NNF contains no existential (msg or temporal), polarity-flipping through ⇒-antecedents and ¬.
- workspace/pretty-clean/src/lemma.rs (new, 172 lines): restriction wrapper (statement at nest 2, conditional `// safety formula`, blank line, `/* expanded formula: */` comment rendering the same formula twice — expansion is upstream) and lemma wrapper (`lemma N [attrs]:` with space-before-[, source-order duplicate-keeping attrs `sources/reuse/use_induction/hide_lemma=/heuristic=`, fill after `[`; `all-traces|exists-trace "…"` sep at nest 2; guarded comment frame at col 0 with header keyed to the trace quantifier plus the failed-conversion variant indenting the error +2; tail `by sorry` or verbatim embedded-proof input). ast.rs R3 types fleshed out (Guarded = Formula(String)|Failed(String) opaque inputs); lib.rs exports render_formula/render_restriction/render_lemma.
- ONE R1 CORRECTION (falsified by round-3 corpus evidence, alethea Universal_VerProofV_v1): AC-operator terms use the SAME single-fill construction as tuples — `fcat ('(' : map (nest 1) (punctuate op elems) ++ [')'])` — so `)` can drop alone to the column of `(`. The old beside-attached law agreed on every R1-observed shape. R1/R2 suites unaffected (all still green).
- round3/: families.tsv (14 curated + 6 validation-extension files), fetch_hs_targets.sh, targets/ (20 HS reference echoes).
- tests/round3_formulas.rs (1126 lines): 8 probe-pinned unit tests + whole-block parity via a layout-insensitive echo parser (whitespace discarded; guarded content and proof scripts extracted verbatim as opaque inputs; safety-line presence cross-checked against my classifier per restriction).

ACCEPTANCE: cargo test fully green, zero warnings — 6 doc-engine + 47 R1 + 9 R2 + 9 R3; parity = 84 restriction blocks + 139 lemma blocks byte-identical across all 20 captures (incl. accountability-generated lemmas with .idx vars, 5G attr fill-wraps, axiom→restriction, sapic/predicate-expanded files, embedded-proof prefix files).

DISCIPLINE: 18 new q_* probes + 6 corpus survey echoes + 2 target fetches, every oracle interaction logged in workspace/QUERIES.log (88 lines total); BEHAVIOR.md gained "Formula rendering (R3)", "Restriction blocks (R3)", "Lemma blocks (R3)" sections with per-law probe provenance, the corrected R1 AC law, and 9 new UNOBSERVABLE register entries (LessMset spelling, Pred atoms expanded upstream, diff-mode left/right + diffLemma out of the parity corpus, lemma modulo annotation, unobserved attrs, formula fact-annotations, ⇔ safety polarity, guarded/proof content = ported input, non-guarded restrictions fatal upstream). OOM guards preserved; max 6 concurrent oracle runs; no files outside the pretty/ workspace + scratchpad; no git commits; fm24 C8.spthy dropped from curation (exceeds the 60s oracle timeout).

Remaining for later rounds: R4 predicates block + top-level theory assembly; diff-mode surfaces must be pinned before any diff-file parity claim.

Round-3 similarity audit complete. Appended a full round-3 section to `/home/kamilner/tamarin-cleanroom/pretty/AUDIT.md`.

Summary of what I verified against upstream (`Theory/Model/Formula.hs`, `Atom.hs`, `Highlight.hs` `opParens`, `Lemma.hs`, `TheoryObject.hs`, `Guarded.hs`):

- **Parenthesization derivation (special scrutiny): clean.** Upstream has *no precedence table* — `opParens` (Highlight.hs 59) unconditionally wraps both operands of `pp (Conn …)` and the `¬` argument. The clean matched that observable always-parens behavior via a genuine discriminator, probe `q_p2` (s3/s4 left-vs-right chains echo distinctly ⇒ association preserved + full paren, not table-lifted), and the guarded block in the same capture uses a *different* paren discipline that the clean consumes verbatim rather than reproducing. `connective_doc`'s Doc shape equals upstream's `sep [opParens p' <-> ppOp op, opParens q']` but is byte-forced merger (BSD `sep`/`beside_space`, never GPL `operator_`/`<->`).
- **Binder allocation: divergent/independent.** Named-AST `Forall(Vec<VarSpec>,…)` + `fsep` vs upstream de-Bruijn + `openFormulaPrefix`/`scopeFreshness`/`avoidPrecise`/`MonadFresh`. Only the output `fsep` coincides (q_b1/q_l2 pinned).
- **Helper decomposition: divergent.** `relation_doc` unifies `= < ⊏` (upstream splits `Less` off with no `sep` and raw `show`); `is_safety` is a direct polarity-tracking NNF scan (q_s1 msg-∃ + temporal-∃; q_s2 antecedent-flip u4) vs upstream's guarded-transform + `noExistential` — no upstream analogue to transcribe; `/* */` framing stacked via `above_op` vs upstream `multiComment` fill; header `[`/`]:` tokenised vs `brackets`.
- **Scans clean.** No upstream identifiers/author-handles in `src/`; AST enums diverge from upstream constructor sets (adds `LessMset`, renames `EqE→Eq`/`Syntactic(Pred)→Pred`; `LemmaAttr` a witnessed subset with own names); non-observable constants (`nest 1/2`, `+2`) probe-pinned; no ghost-comment/lineage narration.
- **Verification.** Full test suite green (R1 47, R2 9, R3 9, lib 6); parity harness byte-checks 84 restriction + 139 lemma blocks with a whitespace-discarding parser and opaque guarded/proof carried verbatim. `ac_doc` correction this round is the same byte-forced `ppTerms` convergence as R2's tuple, forced by the alethea `)`-drop witness. 84 restrictions ↔ 84 expanded-comment emits confirms the unconditional-emit is oracle-faithful.

No similarity violations; five non-blocking advisory notes recorded (safety-classifier closedness/`⇔` latent deltas, unobservable `LessMset`/`Pred` placeholders, binder-prefix-collapse interface contract, forward-integration render-once caveat, diff-mode deferral). No BEHAVIORAL redo instructions required.

VERDICT: pass
